title: JSCommandManager
description: The CommandManager is an easy-to-use plugin that allows players to create their own custom commands in-game.
body:
## CommandManager

[Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/wu6pvdGdka)

The **CommandManager** is an easy-to-use plugin that allows players to create their own custom commands in-game. Enhance your Minecraft experience by adding personal commands with unique responses! Perfect for server administrators looking to give their players more freedom.

### Features
- **Create Custom Commands:** Players can create up to 5 custom commands with specific responses.
- **Easy to Use:** Simply use the command `/createcommand <command_name> <response>` directly in-game.
- **Command Storage:** All custom commands are saved in a `commands.yml` file, ensuring they persist after a server restart.
- **Simple Installation:** Just drop the plugin `.jar` file into your server's `plugins` folder and restart!

### Instructions
1. Install the plugin by placing the `.jar` file into your Spigot server's `plugins` folder.
2. Restart the server.
3. Use the command `/createcommand <command_name> <response>` to create your own command.
4. Test your new custom commands in-game!

### Supported Versions
- Spigot 1.18 and above

### Feedback
We welcome your feedback! If you have any issues or suggestions, please contact us on the Discord server.
